---
lang: en-CA
format:
  pdf:
    pdf-engine: xelatex
    documentclass: article
    papersize: letter
    fontsize: 10pt
    geometry:
      - top=0.58in
      - bottom=0.62in
      - left=0.70in
      - right=0.70in
    include-in-header: cv-header.tex
    number-sections: false
    toc: false
    keep-tex: false
output-file: cv.pdf
---

```{=latex}
\begin{center}
  {\fontsize{24}{27}\selectfont\bfseries\color{cvnavy} Gabriel Frazer-McKee}\\[0.55em]
  \small
  \cvlink{https://gafrm.github.io}{webblue}{\faGlobe}{Website}
  \quad
  \cvlink{mailto:gabriel.frazer.mckee@gmail.com}{emailred}{\faEnvelope}{Email}
  \quad
  \cvlink{https://orcid.org/0000-0002-0860-6192}{orcidgreen}{\faOrcid}{ORCID}
  \quad
  \cvlink{https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=MWAQth4AAAAJ}{scholarblue}{\faGraduationCap}{Google Scholar}\\[0.35em]
  \cvlink{https://github.com/gafrm}{githubblack}{\faGithub}{GitHub}
  \quad
  \cvlink{https://www.linkedin.com/in/gabriel-frazer-mckee-401586220/}{linkedinblue}{\faLinkedinIn}{LinkedIn}
  \quad
  \cvlink{https://www.researchgate.net/profile/Gabriel-Frazer-Mckee}{researchgateteal}{\faResearchgate}{ResearchGate}
\end{center}
\vspace{-0.55em}
```

{{< include ../_generated/cv-orcid.md >}}
